adventure.title: The Venom Pit
adventure.introduction: You stand in a sunken stone pit beneath a ruined temple, ankle-deep in muck, your companion Willa beside you. Three creatures lurk in the filth before you: a pit viper coiled on a ledge, a carrion crawler worming through the muck, and a quivering ochre jelly. Each demands a different answer.

pit.name: The Venom Pit
pit.description: A circular pit of slick stone, ankle-deep in muck. A pit viper is coiled on a ledge, its fangs dripping venom. A carrion crawler undulates through the filth, tentacles quivering — its touch paralyses. An ochre jelly quivers in a corner. A rope hangs from the surface above. Willa, a young acolyte with a short blade, watches your back.

exits.direction: Up the rope to the surface

surface.name: Temple Ruins
surface.description: The ruined temple floor above the pit. Daylight and safety. The rope still hangs down into the pit.

exits.direction: Back down the rope into the pit

longsword.name: Longsword
longsword.description: A standard steel longsword, well-balanced and sharp. Deals slashing damage.

war_hammer.name: War Hammer
war_hammer.description: A heavy one-handed hammer. Deals bludgeoning damage.

health_potion.name: Healing Potion
health_potion.description: A vial of crimson liquid that heals 2d4+2 HP when drunk.

antidote.name: Antidote
antidote.description: A bitter draught that purges venom. Drinking it removes the poisoned condition.

willa.name: Willa
willa.description: A young acolyte with a short blade and steady nerves. She fights at your side.

dialogue.guidelines: Earnest, brave, and a little naive. Speaks plainly. Already allied with the player.

pit_viper.name: Pit Viper
pit_viper.description: A thick serpent coiled on a stone ledge, fangs slick with venom. Its bite injects a toxin that sickens and weakens (CON save vs poison).

success.narrative: You shake off the worst of the venom.

failure.narrative: Venom burns through your veins — you are poisoned!

carrion_crawler.name: Carrion Crawler
carrion_crawler.description: A huge segmented worm with a ring of quivering tentacles around its maw. Every round it lashes with its paralysing tentacles (CON save or stunned) and then bites.

success.narrative: You fight off the numbing toxin.

failure.narrative: Your limbs seize up — you are stunned!

ochre_jelly.name: Ochre Jelly
ochre_jelly.description: A quivering mound of ochre protoplasm. It is slow and sluggish, oozing across the floor and leaving a trail of slime.

power_strike.name: Power Strike
power_strike.description: You put everything into a single mighty blow — an all-out attack for 2d6 slashing damage. Usable twice per combat.

healing_hands.name: Healing Hands
healing_hands.description: You lay glowing hands on an ally, knitting their wounds for 2d4+2 HP. Usable twice per combat.
